summary: Iteration 56 - Verified all 6 bug fixes for TRANSFORM app. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All bugs verified fixed via Playwright.

issues: Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in TableBody - needs key attribute fix in ClientKPIPage.js

critical_code_review_comments: MembersPage.js: Line 192-224 RENEWAL_DURATION_OPTIONS correctly deduplicates using Set - working as expected
MembersPage.js: Line 305-354 DUO grouping logic correctly places partners after primary members
AttendancePage.js: Line 114-119 filteredMembers correctly excludes is_coach=true members
ClientKPIPage.js: Line 108-115 memberStats correctly excludes coaches and departed (exit_date < today)
kpis.py: Line 127-151 KPI details uses transaction.type field to classify revenue/expense correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified all 6 bug fixes: (1) Zaharna DUO partner Neal shows correctly with PARTENAIRE badge, (2) Alexandra Dankova appears in 'Expirés/Churn' tab since her subscription_end_date=2026-03-11 is past, (3) Caroline Maerten's 300 CHF '6 WEEKS CHALLENGE' transaction correctly appears in revenue_breakdown not expense_breakdown, (4) AttendancePage filters out coaches - searching 'Aaron Dos' returns 0 results, (5) ClientKPIPage filters out coaches and departed - searching 'Aaron' shows 'Aucun membre trouvé', (6) Renewal modal duration options are deduplicated to unique values only: ['6 semaines', '1 mois', '12 mois', '6 mois']

BUG_1_DUO_Partner.evidence: Search 'Zaharna' shows 2 results: 'Nathalie Zaharna & Neal' (DUO badge) and 'Neal Zaharna' (PARTENAIRE badge)

BUG_2_Dankova_Visibility.evidence: Alexandra Dankova appears in 'Expirés/Churn' view with IFRC membership, expiration 11 mars 2026

BUG_3_Caroline_Revenue.evidence: GET /api/monthly-kpis/2026-03/details shows Caroline Maerten's 300 CHF transaction in revenue_breakdown under '6 WEEKS CHALLENGE' category

BUG_4_Coaches_Blocked_Attendance.evidence: AttendancePage filters members with !is_coach; searching 'Aaron Dos' returns 'Aucun membre trouvé'

BUG_5_Expired_Members_KPI.evidence: KPI Clients page excludes coaches and departed members; searching 'Aaron' shows 'Aucun membre trouvé'
BUG_5_Expired_Members_KPI.note: Expired members (with subscription_end_date < today but no exit_date) still appear - this is correct behavior per code design

BUG_6_Renewal_Deduplication.evidence: Renewal modal shows exactly 4 unique options: ['6 semaines', '1 mois', '12 mois', '6 mois'] - no duplicates
